mx_clam_id: Mx Claim ID (Mx Claim ID and Service Number form composite primary key)
mx_svc_num: Mx Service Number (Mx Claim ID and Service Number form composite primary key)
svc_dt: Service Start Date of Procedure in YYYY-MM-DD format
data_src: Data Source. Mx = Physician Office, Hx = Hospital/Institution
bil_prvdr_id: IQVIA Provider ID of the billing provider or organization
rndr_prvdr_id: IQVIA Provider ID of the rendering provider or organization
fclt_prvdr_id: IQVIA Provider ID of the facility provider or organization
ref_prvdr_id: IQVIA Provider ID of the referring provider or organization
spec_desc: Speciality Description sample values for reference are : [INTERNAL MEDICINE, HEMATOLOGY/ONCOLOGY, FAMILY MEDICINE, NURSE PRACTITIONER, PHYSICAL THERAPY, EMERGENCY MEDICINE, PHYSICIAN ASSISTANT, NEPHROLOGY, OPHTHALMOLOGY, DIAGNOSTIC RADIOLOGY, OBSTETRICS & GYNECOLOGY, CARDIOVASCULAR DISEASE, RADIATION ONCOLOGY, MEDICAL ONCOLOGY, GENERAL SURGERY, ORTHOPEDIC SURGERY, ANATOMIC/CLINICAL PATHOLOGY, HOSPITALIST, UROLOGY, CHIROPRACTIC, GASTROENTEROLOGY, RHEUMATOLOGY, DERMATOLOGY, PODIATRIST, OPTOMETRIST]
pt_cycle_id: Patient Cycle ID or batch ID
